headline: Zoetis Is Today’s Worst S&P 500 Stock. Why the Quarter Is ‘Worse Than It Seems.’
summary: Shares of  Zoetis  plummeted Thursday, after the animal-health company’s results missed Wall Street expectations and cut its full-year guidance.  Zoetis  stock sank 20% to $88.94 on Thursday, making it the session’s worst performer in the  and putting on pace for its lowest close in more than seven years, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates, Stock Drops 13%
summary: Animal health company Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales only rose 1.9% year on year to $2.26 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $9.82 billion at the midpoint came in 0.8% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.53 per share was 5.3% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
